_comment: veritaserum goose adapter — BLOCKING/CORRECTIVE variant (see ../README.md 'blocking variant'). Alternative to hooks.json's async Stop hook: install this file as its own plugin (renamed to hooks.json in the destination plugin dir — see README install command) so the two variants never collide. Stop runs scripts/vs-stop-block.sh, which execs `veritaserum hook-stop-goose-block`: a SYNCHRONOUS audit that BLOCKS turn-end (exit 2 + a stderr reason) when the turn's claims are unsupported/contradicted, or lets it finish (exit 0) otherwise. VS_BLOCK_CAP bounds the corrective loop per session so it never deadlocks.
